name_zh: 微信小程序本地 CLI 调试支持
problem_statement_zh: 让 agent 通过本地 JSON CLI 稳定、低延迟地调试微信小程序运行时：一条命令连上（自动解析 miniprogramRoot + 自动化端口），常驻 session 复用同一条连接，重复命令近乎瞬时且 uid 跨命令保持，避免每步重连造成的卡顿和混用其他后端的副作用。
problem_statement_en: Let agents debug a WeChat Mini Program runtime through the local JSON CLI reliably and with low latency: one-command connect (auto-resolve miniprogramRoot + automation port), a persistent session reusing one connection so repeat commands are near-instant and element uids persist across calls — eliminating the per-call reconnect lag and avoiding mixed-backend side effects.

must_activate_on: start a mp session / connect to DevTools
query then tap/input an element by uid
switch backend env / pull server error log by requestId
won't-connect / 模拟器启动失败 diagnosis
must_not_activate_on: source-only Mini Program refactors without runtime

preflight: vince-mp session start (auto-resolve project + ensure automation port + attach)
steps: act by persisted uid (tap/input) or scan/shot/step
verify the effect with a follow-up read
reporting: separate confirmed evidence from next steps
include the exact recovery command on failure

forbidden_tools: non-CLI automation backend for new workflows
human_gate_conditions: launch/reLaunch (beyond session start ensuring the port)

trajectory_assertions: uids persist in a session, stale only after navigation/mutation
